examples.title: Chief Executive
examples.description: Determine and formulate policies and provide overall direction of companies or private and public sector organizations within guidelines set up by a board of directors or similar governing body. Plan, direct, or coordinate operational activities at the highest level of management with the help of subordinate executives and staff managers.
examples.headline: AI compresses preparation, not responsibility.
examples.publicMessage: Executive work changes less through replacement than through disciplined augmentation: better briefs, stronger challenge, clearer options, and more auditable decisions.
examples.executiveSummary: The Chief Executive role is not a credible candidate for whole-task automation. Its value lies in judgment under uncertainty, institutional accountability, strategic trade-offs, board relationships, legitimacy, and final responsibility. AI can still matter greatly by preparing evidence, developing options, testing assumptions, drafting communication, maintaining decision records, and monitoring implementation signals. The human leader remains responsible for direction, values, legitimacy, and final authority.

priorityTasks.task: Direct, plan, or implement policies, objectives, or activities of organizations or businesses to ensure continuing operations, to maximize returns on investments, or to increase productivity.
priorityTasks.control: Sample review, audit log, exception queue

priorityTasks.task: Review reports submitted by staff members to recommend approval or to suggest changes.
priorityTasks.control: Human review before use, source check, version control

priorityTasks.task: Analyze operations to evaluate performance of a company or its staff in meeting objectives or to determine areas of potential cost reduction, program improvement, or policy change.
priorityTasks.control: Human review before use, source check, version control

priorityTasks.task: Prepare or present reports concerning activities, expenses, budgets, government statutes or rulings, or other items affecting businesses or program services.
priorityTasks.control: Human review before use, source check, version control

priorityTasks.task: Confer with board members, organization officials, or staff members to discuss issues, coordinate activities, or resolve problems.
priorityTasks.control: Human review before use, source check, version control

riskCapabilityCells.title: High capability, high risk
riskCapabilityCells.text: Use AI for preparation, comparison, drafting, and evidence organization. Keep approval, interpretation, and accountability human.

riskCapabilityCells.title: High capability, medium risk
riskCapabilityCells.text: Good fit for Assist mode: standardized documentation, summaries, structured analysis, and routine follow-up.

riskCapabilityCells.title: Medium capability, high risk
riskCapabilityCells.text: Use only in Advise mode where the work affects people, money, rights, compliance, or institutional trust.

riskCapabilityCells.title: Low capability or high accountability
riskCapabilityCells.text: Keep human-led where legitimacy, empathy, final judgment, professional assurance, or strategic trade-offs dominate.

controlArchitecture: No autonomous AI approval for strategic, financial, legal, staffing, reputational, or board-level decisions.
All AI-assisted executive outputs require named human ownership.
Major decisions should include an assumptions log, source list, alternative options, and dissent or challenge note.
AI-generated board materials must be checked against source documents before circulation.
Sensitive data should be minimized or kept inside approved secure environments.

examples.title: Management Analyst
examples.description: Conduct organizational studies and evaluations, design systems and procedures, conduct work simplification and measurement studies, and prepare operations and procedures manuals to assist management in operating more efficiently and effectively. Includes program analysts and management consultants.
examples.headline: AI accelerates analysis, but does not own diagnosis.
examples.publicMessage: The role becomes less about assembling information and more about testing interpretation, designing change, and translating analysis into credible implementation.
examples.executiveSummary: Management analysis is highly exposed to AI-enabled time compression because the work is rich in data gathering, document review, benchmarking, option development, and recommendation drafting. The danger is not that AI produces too little, but that it produces plausible analysis without enough organizational context. AI-OS therefore treats AI as a research, synthesis, modeling, and first-draft engine while preserving human responsibility for diagnosis, stakeholder judgment, implementation design, and political feasibility.

priorityTasks.task: Analyze data gathered and develop solutions or alternative methods of proceeding.
priorityTasks.control: Sample review, audit log, exception queue

priorityTasks.task: Plan study of work problems and procedures, such as organizational change, communications, information flow, integrated production methods, inventory control, or cost analysis.
priorityTasks.control: Sample review, audit log, exception queue

priorityTasks.task: Review forms and reports and confer with management and users about format, distribution, and purpose, identifying problems and improvements.
priorityTasks.control: Sample review, audit log, exception queue

priorityTasks.task: Document findings of study and prepare recommendations for implementation of new systems, procedures, or organizational changes.
priorityTasks.control: Human review before use, source check, version control

priorityTasks.task: Interview personnel and conduct on-site observation to ascertain unit functions, work performed, and methods, equipment, and personnel used.
priorityTasks.control: Human review before use, source check, version control

riskCapabilityCells.title: High capability, high risk
riskCapabilityCells.text: Use AI for preparation, comparison, drafting, and evidence organization. Keep approval, interpretation, and accountability human.

riskCapabilityCells.title: High capability, medium risk
riskCapabilityCells.text: Good fit for Assist mode: standardized documentation, summaries, structured analysis, and routine follow-up.

riskCapabilityCells.title: Medium capability, high risk
riskCapabilityCells.text: Use only in Advise mode where the work affects people, money, rights, compliance, or institutional trust.

riskCapabilityCells.title: Low capability or high accountability
riskCapabilityCells.text: Keep human-led where legitimacy, empathy, final judgment, professional assurance, or strategic trade-offs dominate.

controlArchitecture: Require source traceability for research and benchmark claims.
Separate AI-generated options from human-approved recommendations.
Document assumptions, exclusions, and alternative explanations.
Validate proposed changes with affected stakeholders before implementation.
Treat AI outputs as draft analysis, not organizational diagnosis.

examples.title: Human Resources Specialist
examples.description: Recruit, screen, interview, or place individuals within an organization. May perform other activities in multiple human resources areas.
examples.headline: AI can support people work, but must not launder employment decisions.
examples.publicMessage: The future HR role becomes a governance-heavy people function: faster administration, but stronger fairness review, documentation, and human accountability.
examples.executiveSummary: Human Resources Specialists show strong potential for AI assistance in job analysis, document drafting, policy explanation, candidate communication, reporting, and preparation of structured materials. The control problem is severe because HR decisions affect people directly and can create legal, ethical, fairness, and reputational risk. AI-OS therefore allows AI to organize, draft, compare, and prepare, while keeping employment decisions, grievance handling, sensitive interpretation, and fairness judgments under accountable human control.

priorityTasks.task: Review employment applications and job orders to match applicants with job requirements.
priorityTasks.control: Sample review, audit log, exception queue

priorityTasks.task: Prepare or maintain employment records related to events, such as hiring, termination, leaves, transfers, or promotions, using human resources management system software.
priorityTasks.control: Sample review, audit log, exception queue

priorityTasks.task: Inform job applicants of details such as duties and responsibilities, compensation, benefits, schedules, working conditions, or promotion opportunities.
priorityTasks.control: Sample review, audit log, exception queue

priorityTasks.task: Select qualified job applicants or refer them to managers, making hiring recommendations when appropriate.
priorityTasks.control: Human review before use, source check, version control

priorityTasks.task: Analyze employment-related data and prepare required reports.
priorityTasks.control: Sample review, audit log, exception queue

riskCapabilityCells.title: High capability, high risk
riskCapabilityCells.text: Use AI for preparation, comparison, drafting, and evidence organization. Keep approval, interpretation, and accountability human.

riskCapabilityCells.title: High capability, medium risk
riskCapabilityCells.text: Good fit for Assist mode: standardized documentation, summaries, structured analysis, and routine follow-up.

riskCapabilityCells.title: Medium capability, high risk
riskCapabilityCells.text: Use only in Advise mode where the work affects people, money, rights, compliance, or institutional trust.

riskCapabilityCells.title: Low capability or high accountability
riskCapabilityCells.text: Keep human-led where legitimacy, empathy, final judgment, professional assurance, or strategic trade-offs dominate.

rebundledRole: Human-centered employee and manager advisory work
controlArchitecture: No autonomous hiring, rejection, discipline, promotion, or grievance decisioning.
Maintain human review of candidate-matching and screening outputs.
Check policy and legal interpretations before communicating externally.
Monitor bias risks in job descriptions, screening criteria, and candidate summaries.
Keep sensitive employee data inside approved systems and document access rules.

examples.title: Accountant and Auditor
examples.description: Examine, analyze, and interpret accounting records to prepare financial statements, give advice, or audit and evaluate statements prepared by others. Install or advise on systems of recording costs or other financial and budgetary data.
examples.headline: AI compresses process work if controls become stronger, not weaker.
examples.publicMessage: The role shifts from manual preparation toward exception handling, assurance design, control testing, and management interpretation.
examples.executiveSummary: Accountants and Auditors are a strong AI-OS case because many tasks involve structured records, reconciliation, report preparation, variance review, documentation, and evidence collation. These are highly compressible. The professional risk is that speed can weaken control discipline if outputs are accepted without traceability. AI-OS therefore treats AI as a controlled automation and verification layer: useful for checking, drafting, reconciling, and flagging exceptions, but not for unreviewed assurance, sign-off, or professional judgment.

priorityTasks.task: Review accounts for discrepancies and reconcile differences.
priorityTasks.control: Sample review, audit log, exception queue

priorityTasks.task: Inspect account books and accounting systems for efficiency, effectiveness, and use of accepted accounting procedures to record transactions.
priorityTasks.control: Sample review, audit log, exception queue

priorityTasks.task: Prepare adjusting journal entries.
priorityTasks.control: Sample review, audit log, exception queue

priorityTasks.task: Report to management regarding the finances of establishment.
priorityTasks.control: Sample review, audit log, exception queue

priorityTasks.task: Develop, implement, modify, and document recordkeeping and accounting systems, making use of current computer technology.
priorityTasks.control: Sample review, audit log, exception queue

riskCapabilityCells.title: High capability, high risk
riskCapabilityCells.text: Use AI for preparation, comparison, drafting, and evidence organization. Keep approval, interpretation, and accountability human.

riskCapabilityCells.title: High capability, medium risk
riskCapabilityCells.text: Good fit for Assist mode: standardized documentation, summaries, structured analysis, and routine follow-up.

riskCapabilityCells.title: Medium capability, high risk
riskCapabilityCells.text: Use only in Advise mode where the work affects people, money, rights, compliance, or institutional trust.

riskCapabilityCells.title: Low capability or high accountability
riskCapabilityCells.text: Keep human-led where legitimacy, empathy, final judgment, professional assurance, or strategic trade-offs dominate.

controlArchitecture: Keep audit trails for AI-assisted reconciliations, classifications, and journal suggestions.
Use sample review, exception queues, and materiality thresholds.
Require human sign-off for financial statements, audit judgments, and compliance interpretations.
Preserve source-document links for all generated summaries.
Treat AI anomaly flags as investigative leads, not conclusions.

examples.title: Customer Service Representative
examples.description: Interact with customers to provide basic or scripted information in response to routine inquiries about products and services. May handle and resolve general complaints. Excludes individuals whose duties are primarily installation, sales, repair, and technical support.
examples.headline: AI can absorb routine flow, but escalation becomes the job design.
examples.publicMessage: The future frontline role is less script-reading and more escalation, trust repair, and resolution of cases that automation cannot safely close.
examples.executiveSummary: Customer service work is often presented as a high-automation case, but the AI-OS result is more disciplined. Routine information, record updating, case classification, standard responses, and triage can be compressed significantly. However, complaints, vulnerable customers, billing disputes, service failures, identity issues, and reputationally sensitive cases require escalation. The redesigned role is not simply smaller. It becomes more focused on exception handling, empathy, problem resolution, and accountable service recovery.

priorityTasks.task: Keep records of customer interactions or transactions, recording details of inquiries, complaints, or comments, as well as actions taken.
priorityTasks.control: Human review before use, source check, version control

priorityTasks.task: Contact customers to respond to inquiries or to notify them of claim investigation results or any planned adjustments.
priorityTasks.control: Human review before use, source check, version control

priorityTasks.task: Complete contract forms, prepare change of address records, or issue service discontinuance orders, using computers.
priorityTasks.control: Human review before use, source check, version control

priorityTasks.task: Confer with customers by telephone or in person to provide information about products or services, take or enter orders, cancel accounts, or obtain details of complaints.
priorityTasks.control: Human decision owner, documented rationale, escalation path

priorityTasks.task: Check to ensure that appropriate changes were made to resolve customers' problems.
priorityTasks.control: Human decision owner, documented rationale, escalation path

riskCapabilityCells.title: High capability, high risk
riskCapabilityCells.text: Use AI for preparation, comparison, drafting, and evidence organization. Keep approval, interpretation, and accountability human.

riskCapabilityCells.title: High capability, medium risk
riskCapabilityCells.text: Good fit for Assist mode: standardized documentation, summaries, structured analysis, and routine follow-up.

riskCapabilityCells.title: Medium capability, high risk
riskCapabilityCells.text: Use only in Advise mode where the work affects people, money, rights, compliance, or institutional trust.

riskCapabilityCells.title: Low capability or high accountability
riskCapabilityCells.text: Keep human-led where legitimacy, empathy, final judgment, professional assurance, or strategic trade-offs dominate.

rebundledRole: Quality monitoring and customer trust protection
controlArchitecture: Define escalation triggers for complaints, vulnerability, billing disputes, identity issues, and reputational risk.
Require audit logs for AI-generated customer responses and case classifications.
Do not let AI close high-impact or unresolved grievance cases without human review.
Monitor customer satisfaction, complaint recurrence, and false-resolution patterns.
Keep humans available for empathy, ambiguity, and accountability.
